title: IIT Kanpur Content Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
org: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur has released the official notification for 1 Content Manager posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Content Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur has released the official notification for 1 Content Manager posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Arts, Commerce, Management, Science, Engineering, or Interdisciplinary Sciences from a recognised University / Institute with a minimum of 50% marks, At least two (2) years experience in similar roles in an academic institution
qualification.details: Content Manager: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Arts, Commerce, Management, Science, Engineering, or Interdisciplinary Sciences from a recognised University / Institute with a minimum of 50% marks and at least two (2) years experience in similar roles in an academic institution.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Content Manager Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.iitk.ac.in/dord/project/imoc-cm-16-05-26.html.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Kanpur Content Manager post?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the applications for the Content Manager position at IIT Kanpur is 31st May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Content Manager role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Arts, Commerce, Management, Science, Engineering, or Interdisciplinary Sciences from a recognised University with at least 50% marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any work experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of two years of relevant experience in similar roles within an academic institution is required for the Content Manager position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Content Manager post?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for the Content Manager position ranges from Rs. 50400 to Rs. 126000.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the IIT Kanpur Content Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to download the application form from the official website and send the duly filled form with required documents via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Content Manager role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is an Ad-hoc job type, as indicated in the recruitment details.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of IIT Kanpur, the link for which is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies for the Content Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Content Manager at IIT Kanpur.
